hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams review corporate clients by connecting KYB checks, ownership data, risk rules and cases into audit-ready enhanced due diligence workflows.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Corporate EDD reviews slow under disconnected tools
problem_description: Compliance teams managing corporate enhanced due diligence face delays when KYB, ownership data and risk signals remain spread across multiple providers. This fragmentation makes it harder to link evidence, maintain consistent audit trails and keep regulatory rules aligned in reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYB, ownership data, risk alerts, regulatory rules and case evidence into one compliance workflow so teams can conduct enhanced due diligence reviews with consistent traceability and audit readiness.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to enhanced due diligence
workflow_description: SFTY connects onboarding outputs and KYB risk signals into a structured review process that leads to case creation, decision logging, evidence preservation, and audit-ready reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs conducting enhanced due diligence with controlled provider orchestration, evidence preservation and deployment standards for audit and bank review readiness.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for corporate compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance control layer that connects corporate KYB, ownership checks and risk reviews into structured workflows, cases, decisions and audit evidence for compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support enhanced due diligence workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures enhanced due diligence by orchestrating KYB, ownership and risk signals, applying internal policies, routing reviews, and preserving decision logs and evidence within operational cases.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to maintain audit-ready records that demonstrate compliance decisions and support regulatory or internal reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY can connect to existing KYC, KYB, screening and risk providers, integrating their outputs into centralized workflows without disrupting current compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current KYB or screening tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYB or screening providers; it complements them by turning their outputs into coordinated workflows, evidence packages and reporting records.
final_title: Structure corporate enhanced due diligence workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYB checks, ownership data, risk rules and cases into audit-ready enhanced due diligence workflows.
